scripts.postinstall: prisma generate && DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.test.prisma
scripts.test: DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.test.prisma --skip-generate && DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.test.prisma && vitest run
scripts.reset: npx prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed && npm run seed
